Twice now driving on the freeway in my brand new 2022 Plug-in Pacifica with 10K miles— all of a sudden there is a rumble (feels like a down shift) and the vehicle won’t accelerate. The dash message started flashing “Put in P to Start.”   However, the car is still on and in “run.”

narrative.headline: What 2022 Chrysler Pacifica Hybrid owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 114 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (48% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
